# Zealy API

## Zealy Documentation

- [Introduction](https://docs.zealy.io/introduction.md)
- [Authentication](https://docs.zealy.io/authentication.md)
- [Use cases](https://docs.zealy.io/use-cases.md)
- [Rate limits](https://docs.zealy.io/rate-limits.md)
- [Pagination](https://docs.zealy.io/pagination.md)
- [FAQ](https://docs.zealy.io/faq.md)
- [Communities](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/communities.md)
- [Community lookup](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/communities/community-lookup.md)
- [Community member check](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/communities/community-member-check.md)
- [Community Secret Retrieval](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/communities/community-secret-retrieval.md)
- [Community Secret Creation](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/communities/community-secret-creation.md)
- [Users](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users.md)
- [User lookup](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users/user-lookup.md)
- [Add & Remove XP](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users/add-and-remove-xp.md)
- [Ban user](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users/ban-user.md)
- [Referral code](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users/referral-code.md)
- [Delete Zealy Connect for member](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/users/delete-zealy-connect-for-member.md): This endpoint is used to delete a Zealy Connect for a specific user within a community. The connection is uniquely identified by the combination of the user, community, and redirect URL.
- [Leaderboards](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/leaderboards.md)
- [Retrieve a leaderboard](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/leaderboards/retrieve-a-leaderboard.md)
- [List sprints](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/leaderboards/list-sprints.md)
- [Reviews](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/reviews.md)
- [Claimed quests lookup](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/reviews/claimed-quests-lookup.md)
- [Review a submission](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/reviews/review-a-submission.md)
- [Review events](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/reviews/review-events.md)
- [Modules](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/modules.md)
- [Quests](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/quests.md)
- [Create quest](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/quests/create-quest.md)
- [Update quest](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/quests/update-quest.md)
- [List quests](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/quests/list-quests.md)
- [Webhooks](https://docs.zealy.io/api-reference/webhooks.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.zealy.io/introduction.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
